member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.Modes
member.summary: Plist modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.Modes.SHORT
member.summary: short plist execution mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.Modes.FULL
member.summary: full plist execution.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.Modes.MONITOR
member.summary: pup monitor mode for plist.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable
member.summary: Class that represents the entries of the PPR look up table.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.LutTimeStamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the time stamp for the current LUT.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.PprControlSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the control set applied before pre emphasis action.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.PreEmphasisTimeOut
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout to stop pre emphasis action.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.PostEmphasisTimeOut
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout to stop post emphasis action.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.StopLearning
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the current DUT has stopped learning.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionList
member.summary: Gets or sets PPR Look Up Table actions.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionDefinition
member.summary: Entries for the PPR look up table.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionDefinition.TestInstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets instance name in which PPR actions will be performed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionDefinition.PerTtrModeActionList
member.summary: Gets or sets instance name in which PPR actions will be performed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams
member.summary: Entries for the PPR look up table.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.ModeList
member.summary: Gets or sets delta value to adjust the current set point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.TemperatureOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets delta value to adjust the current set point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.PowerScalarFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the scale to modify the power seen by the tester.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.UpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper tolerance from release temperature.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.LowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower tolerance from release temperature.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.PprExitTempRangeUpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper tolerance for exit premphasis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.PprExitTempRangeLowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower tolerance for exit premphasis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.PowerSurgeTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the time to wait for a power surge after a control set switch.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.DesiredTestTemperatureScUserGlobal
member.summary: Gets or sets the uservar name containing the setpoint temperature.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.IsBackToBack
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a instance will be repeated in a loop or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.PreEmphasisTimeOutOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout to stop pre emphasis action.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PowerPremonitionResponseLookUpTable.ActionParams.PostEmphasisTimeOutOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout to stop post emphasis action.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod
member.summary: This test methods enables the Power Premonition Response feature that would be call for some selected test instances.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.ControllerType
member.summary: Type of the thermal controller hardware to use.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.ControllerType.TCC
member.summary: Thermal Controller Card.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.ControllerType.DTC
member.summary: Dynamic Thermal Controller.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.Boolean
member.summary: Boolean state.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.Boolean.True
member.summary: True value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.Boolean.False
member.summary: False value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.ThermalController
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use DTC or TCC).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.IsProfileModeEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets the profile mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.ValidLutTimeOut
member.summary: Gets or sets validation time out in seconds.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.LocalLookUpTable
member.summary: Gets or sets the file of the look up table.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.LookUpTableParsedContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the look up table data contents as objects.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.ProcessLookUpTableUserVar
member.summary: This private function verifies that the LookUpTableFilePath parameter is not empty.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.VerifyLookUpTableActions
member.summary: Check if the contents from the look up table are under the expected values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseDeviceStartTestMethod.IsLookUpTableValid
member.summary: This private function verifies if the LUT has the minimum components to be valid.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.FileHandler
member.summary: Main file handler implementation. For basic file IO operations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.IFileHandler
member.summary: File handling interfaces. Usage of FileService is preferred.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.IFileHandler.ReadAll(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.InstanceSetUp
member.summary: dfdfd.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the PowerSum pin assigned to this instance.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the UEI pin assigned to this instance.

member.summary: This test methods enables the Power Premonition Response feature that would be call for some selected test instances.

member.summary: Gets or sets the look up table data contents as objects.

member.summary: Type of the thermal controller hardware to use.

member.summary: Thermal Controller Card.

member.summary: Dynamic Thermal Controller.

member.summary: Enable or disable DTS profile from serial capture.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseInitTestMethod.SerialCaptureProfileState.ENABLED
member.summary: Serial capture DTS profile enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseInitTestMethod.SerialCaptureProfileState.DISABLED
member.summary: Serial capture DTS profile disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.PrimePowerPremonitionResponseInitTestMethod.ProfileInstanceFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the file with the info of the instances to profile.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to capture DTS data or not.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use DTC or TCC).

member.summary: Gets or sets the file of instances to profile.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.TaggedInstances
member.summary: Class with the info of the instances to profile.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.TaggedInstances.PowerScalingMultiplierUserVarName
member.summary: Gets or sets the SC UserVariable which contains a value to multiply with the PowerScalingFactor.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PowerPremonitionResponse.TaggedInstances.Instances
member.summary: Gets or setsDictionary mapping the name of the tagged instances to a pin configuration.
